# Binding Antibody Multiplex Assay (BAMA) - Shiny Dashboard
The following repository consists of the first version of the BAMA Assay dashboard.

## Quick information:

![Information](Images/BAMA_Info_Image.png)
** This image was generated by chatgpt (source: https://chatgpt.com/) using biorender (source: https://www.biorender.com/)

## Quick Start

### 1. Install R dependencies

```r
install.packages(c(
  "shiny",
  "shinydashboard",
  "DT",
  "openxlsx",
  "dplyr",
  "stringr",
  "shinyjs",
  "ggplot2",
  "scales",
  "readxl",
  "jsonlite",
  "ggrepel",
  "tidyr",
  "ragg",
  "DescTools",
  "drc"
))
```

### 2. Run the app

```r
shiny::runApp("path/to/neut_dashboard/")
```

Or from RStudio: open `app.R` → click **Run App**.

---

## Dashboard Tabs

| Tab | Description |
|-----|-------------|
| 🏠 Overview | Summary value boxes and workflow guide |
| 🧪 Plate Data Upload | Upload one or more raw XLS plate files |
| ⚙️ Helper Setup | View/edit the `experiments` & `Setup` sheets live |
| 📋 Plate Review | Full renamed RLU matrix per plate |
| 📝 processed | |
| Analysis >>>
| > 🔬 Point-based| Cell & virus control averages with CV% highlighting |
| > 📊 Titration | Interactive neutralisation curves per plate/virus/sample |
| > 🔢 Quantification | IC50 & IC80 titer table + bar chart |
| 💾 Export | Download XLSX workbook matching the original pipeline output |

---
